name: Verify G+ (General Ability)
description: Measures general cognitive ability including numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning. Used for graduate and professional-level roles requiring strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

name: Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to analyze and interpret numerical data including graphs, tables, and charts. Suitable for roles requiring data analysis, finance, and business reasoning.

name: Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to understand and evaluate written information and draw conclusions. Suitable for roles requiring strong communication and analytical reading.

name: Inductive Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to identify patterns and rules in abstract visual information, indicating fluid intelligence. Useful for roles requiring strategic thinking and innovation.

name: Deductive Reasoning
description: Evaluates the ability to draw logical conclusions from structured information. Used for roles requiring analytical decision making and logical thinking.

name: Numerical Calculation
description: Tests speed and accuracy in basic numerical calculations without a calculator. Suited for clerical, operational, and administrative roles.

name: Reading Comprehension
description: Measures the ability to understand and extract key information from written passages. Appropriate for roles requiring reading and interpretation of written material.

name: Mechanical Comprehension
description: Assesses understanding of mechanical concepts, principles, and machinery. Relevant for engineering, manufacturing, maintenance, and technical roles.

name: OPQ32 (Occupational Personality Questionnaire)
description: Comprehensive personality questionnaire measuring 32 personality characteristics relevant to work behavior, leadership, teamwork, and interpersonal effectiveness. Industry-standard tool for selection and development.

name: OPQ32r
description: A revised, shortened version of OPQ32 measuring key personality dimensions relevant to work performance. Balances depth of insight with efficiency. Good for high-volume recruitment.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Identifies the conditions and factors that increase or decrease a person's motivation at work. Useful for selection, development, and team engagement initiatives.

name: RemoteWorkQ
description: Assesses a candidate's suitability for remote or hybrid work environments, measuring self-management, communication, and digital collaboration skills.

name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
description: Comprehensive assessment of cognitive ability and behavioral traits for global workforce screening. Measures reasoning, agility, and interpersonal skills across cultures.

name: Java (New)
description: Tests knowledge of Java programming including OOP concepts, data structures, collections, exceptions, multithreading, and Java 8+ features. Suitable for software developer roles.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Java 8 specific features including streams, lambdas, Optional, functional interfaces, and the new date/time API.

name: Python (New)
description: Evaluates Python programming skills including data types, control flow, OOP, standard libraries, list comprehensions, decorators, and error handling.

name: SQL (New)
description: Tests proficiency in SQL including SELECT queries, JOINs, aggregations, subqueries, indexes, and database design. Suitable for data analyst, DBA, and backend developer roles.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Covers JavaScript fundamentals, ES6+, DOM manipulation, async programming, closures, and modern JS patterns. For frontend and full-stack developer roles.

name: C++ (New)
description: Assesses C++ programming including memory management, pointers, templates, STL, OOP, and modern C++11/14/17 features.

name: C# (New)
description: Tests C# programming skills including .NET framework, LINQ, async/await, OOP principles, collections, and common design patterns.

name: Technology Professional 8.0 Job Focused Assessment
description: Situational judgment and behavioral assessment for technology professionals. Evaluates problem solving, collaboration, and technical decision-making in realistic scenarios.

name: Entry Level Sales 7.1 (International)
description: Job-focused assessment for entry-level sales roles measuring persuasion, customer focus, resilience, and results orientation in realistic sales scenarios.

name: Customer Service 7.1 (International)
description: Behavioral assessment for customer service roles measuring empathy, communication, problem-solving, and composure when dealing with difficult customers.

name: Supervisory 7.1 (International)
description: Job-focused assessment for supervisory and team leader roles covering delegation, performance management, conflict resolution, and planning.

name: Managerial & Professional 8.0 Job Focused Assessment
description: Scenario-based assessment for managerial and professional candidates measuring leadership, strategic thinking, stakeholder management, and business judgment.

name: Graduate 8.0 Job Focused Assessment
description: Designed for graduate-level candidates entering professional roles. Measures analytical thinking, communication, teamwork, and adaptability through realistic work scenarios.

name: Administrative Professional 7.1 (International)
description: Assesses key competencies for administrative professionals including organization, attention to detail, communication, and prioritization.

name: Call Center 7.1 (International)
description: Job-focused assessment for call center roles measuring telephone communication skills, emotional resilience, multitasking ability, and service orientation.

name: Retail 7.1 (International)
description: Scenario-based assessment for retail roles measuring customer interaction, sales behavior, teamwork, and adaptability in a retail environment.

name: Workplace Personality Inventory (WPI)
description: Measures personality traits relevant to workplace performance including conscientiousness, teamwork, stress tolerance, and interpersonal sensitivity.

name: Workplace Personality Inventory II (WPI II)
description: Enhanced version of WPI providing richer personality profile for workplace fit. Measures dimensions including leadership potential, adaptability, and emotional stability.

name: Situational Judgment Test (SJT) – Leadership
description: Presents realistic leadership dilemmas and measures judgment in areas such as team development, conflict resolution, and driving results.

name: Smart Interview On-Demand
description: AI-powered video interview platform where candidates respond to structured interview questions. Enables asynchronous screening at scale with structured evaluation.

name: Coding Simulation
description: Hands-on coding simulation where candidates write, debug, or extend real code in a browser-based IDE. Evaluates practical software development skills.

name: Microsoft Excel (Intermediate Level)
description: Practical simulation assessing intermediate Excel skills including VLOOKUP, pivot tables, charts, conditional formatting, and formulas.

name: Microsoft Word (Intermediate Level)
description: Assesses intermediate Word skills including formatting, styles, tables, mail merge, and document management.

name: Financial Professional 8.0 Job Focused Assessment
description: Behavioral assessment for finance professionals measuring analytical judgment, risk awareness, compliance mindset, and stakeholder communication.

name: Sales 7.1 (International)
description: Measures sales competencies including prospecting, negotiation, closing, account management, and customer relationship building.

name: Leadership Report (OPQ-based)
description: Uses OPQ results to generate a detailed leadership potential report covering transformational, operational, and people leadership dimensions.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF) Report
description: Generates a competency report from OPQ data aligned to SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Maps personality data to 20 competencies across 8 factors.

name: Dependability & Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: Measures behavioral tendencies related to safety compliance, reliability, rule-following, and honesty. Particularly relevant for safety-critical and operations roles.

name: Agile Simulation
description: Simulates an Agile/Scrum work environment where candidates prioritize backlog items, handle sprint planning, and manage stakeholder expectations.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Calculation
description: Assesses speed and accuracy in arithmetic calculations including addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Used for roles requiring quick numerical processing.

name: SHL Scenarios – Customer Focus
description: Short scenario-based assessment measuring customer-centric behaviors including empathy, service orientation, and problem resolution.

name: SHL Scenarios – Collaboration
description: Measures collaborative behaviors such as sharing information, supporting teammates, conflict resolution, and inclusive communication.

name: SHL Scenarios – Communication
description: Scenario-based assessment of written and verbal communication behaviors including clarity, listening, and adjusting communication style to the audience.

name: SHL Scenarios – Result Orientation
description: Measures drive, initiative, and results-focused behaviors including goal setting, persistence, and overcoming obstacles to deliver outcomes.

name: Hogan Personality Inventory (HPI) – via SHL
description: Measures normal personality characteristics predictive of job performance and career success across seven primary scales.

name: Data Entry Accuracy
description: Practical simulation measuring speed and accuracy in data entry tasks. Relevant for administrative, clerical, and back-office roles requiring precision.
